title: viola rausii
intro: Viola rausii, also known as the Himalayan pansy, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant found in the Himalayan regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola rausii include its ability to treat various ailments such as colds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Viola rausii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
